info.title: MySmartStudy API
info.description: Backend API for MySmartStudy collaborative learning platform

post.description: Idempotent: verify Firebase token, create or return the Firestore user profile.
Send a welcome email to the newly registered user. Best-effort — never raises.

Generate a Firebase password-reset link for `email` and deliver it via our
own SMTP (Firebase's default email delivery is unreliable on free-tier).

Responds 200 regardless of whether the email exists — we don't want to leak
which addresses are registered. The underlying Firebase call is only made
for accounts that have a password provider; Google-only accounts can't
reset a password they don't have.
Upload the banner image shown behind the avatar on the public profile.

schema.title: Response Get My Maps Api Maps  Get
Response Search By Code Api Maps Search By Code Get

get.description:
Return a user's public maps, newest-first. Drives the public profile
page's Maps tab. Viewer-relative flags are filled in so FollowButton /
LikeButton render correctly without a second round-trip.

schema.title: Response List Public Maps For User Api Maps Public User  User Id  Get

get.description: Search maps by exact owner email.

schema.title: Response Search By Email Api Maps Search By Email Get

get.description: Search student users by partial email or display name for autocomplete.
Get maps submitted via assignments for a specific course.

schema.title: Response Search By Course Api Maps Search By Course  Course Id  Get

get.description:
Return the current user's recently viewed maps (enriched), newest first.

Filters out entries whose underlying map no longer exists. Lecturer-only in practice,
but not gated by role — if a student ever records a view it'll round-trip fine.

post.description:
Stamp that the current user just viewed this map. Recorded for lecturers only
(students don't need a 'recently reviewed' list). Upserts on (userId, mapId).

get.description: Get lecturers who have visited this map (from history).

schema.title: Response Get Map History Api Maps  Map Id  History Get

post.description: Update user presence on a map (heartbeat).

get.description: Get active collaborators on a map (seen within last 30s).

patch.description: Update annotation position or content (for dragging sticky notes).

post.description: Upload an image for use inside a mind map node.

schema.title: Response Get Teaching Courses Api Courses Teaching Get
Response Get Enrolled Courses Api Courses Enrolled Get

get.description: Return the user's recently viewed courses, sorted by most recent.

schema.title: Response Get Course Students Api Courses  Course Id  Students Get

post.description: Stamp that the current user just viewed this course.

get.description: Search students by email or display name (for manual enrollment).

schema.title: Response Search Students Api Courses Search Students Get

post.description: Manually add a student to a course by their user ID.

get.description: Get all upcoming assignments for the current student across enrolled courses.

schema.title: Response Get Assignments Api Assignments  Get

get.description: Run TF-IDF similarity check on all submissions for this assignment.
Generate a comprehensive plagiarism report across all submission types.
Get assignments with ungraded submissions for this lecturer.

schema.title: Response Get Lecturer Assignments Api Assignments By Lecturer Get

post.description: Upload a file attachment (PDF, image, etc.) for an assignment.

get.description: Check if the current student can access/submit to this assignment.

schema.title: Response Get Submissions Api Assignments  Aid  Submissions Get
Response Get My Submission Api Assignments  Aid  Submissions Mine Get

post.description: Upload a file submission with magic number validation.
Bulk-update grades for multiple submissions at once.
Mark grades as released so students can see them. Sets releasedAt on the assignment.

schema.title: Response Get Discussions Api Courses  Course Id  Discussions  Get

patch.description: Edit a discussion message. Only the sender can edit their own message.

get.description: Get replies to a discussion message.

schema.title: Response Get Replies Api Courses  Course Id  Discussions  Msg Id  Replies Get

post.description: Reply to a discussion message.

schema.title: Response Get Announcements Api Courses  Course Id  Announcements  Get
Response Get Modules Api Courses  Course Id  Modules  Get

post.description:
Attach a PDF to an existing (typically Canva/link) item so AI generation
can extract text from it without relying on remote rendering.
Record that a student opened a resource.

get.description: Get the current user's progress for all resources in a course.

schema.title: Response Get Progress Api Courses  Course Id  Modules Progress Get

post.description: Clone a map_template resource into the student's personal maps.

schema.title: Response Get Reminders Api Reminders  Get

get.description: Return all badge definitions: built-in defaults + custom ones from Firestore.

Run badge checks for the current user and return any newly awarded badges.
Only students can earn badges — admins and lecturers are skipped.

post.description: Upload a .lottie file for a badge definition. Returns the URL.

get.description: Return lottie_url overrides for default badges.
Count maps by type across lecturer's students.
7x24 grid of activity counts (day-of-week x hour).
Students inactive for >7 days or with 0 submissions.
Weekly submission counts over the past 8 weeks.

delete.description:
Permanently delete a user from Firestore and Firebase Auth.
Admins cannot delete themselves.

get.description: Get all homepage content items (admin only for management).

post.description: Create a new homepage content item (news/poster).
Upload a poster/news image for the homepage.

get.description: Return per-user AI token usage aggregates plus a cross-user feature summary.

patch.description: Override (or reset) the daily image generation limit for a specific user.

get.description: Return the current global daily token limit (or the default if unset).

patch.description: Set the global daily token limit applied to all users without an override.
Override (or reset to global) the daily token limit for a specific user.

get.description: Return the global AI master switch + per-feature kill list.

patch.description: Patch the global AI gate. Pass either field — both are optional.

get.description:
Return the top N users ranked by total time spent on the system.

Each record includes user info, lifetime minutes, per-feature breakdown,
and most/least used features. Consumed by the admin usage-analytics page
and the PDF export.
Per-user usage analytics: lifetime feature breakdown + last N days of daily sessions.

post.description:
Email a broadcast announcement to the chosen audience and persist a record.

Each recipient gets a fire-and-forget SMTP email via send_notification_email
(spawns a daemon thread per recipient — safe even if SMTP is unconfigured).

get.description: Recent admin broadcast emails, newest first.
Return the global SMTP gate config used by create_notification().

patch.description: Patch the global SMTP gate. Pass either field — both are optional.

post.description:
Record one minute of user activity on a given feature.

Clients should ping this endpoint every ~60 seconds while the app is
foregrounded. Backend accumulates per-user-per-day minutes and a rolling
lifetime aggregate used by the admin analytics pages.

schema.title: Response Get Reflections Api Activity Reflections Get

get.description: Return 30-day daily map edit counts.
Compare map creation counts between current and previous month.
Count maps by graph_format.

Notifications grouped into Instagram-style digests.

Buckets raw notifications of the same (type, link) tuple within a rolling
window (default 24h) into a single entry with an actors[] list and a
count. Clients render "Ali, Sarah and 3 others liked your mind map
'Sejarah'" from the resulting digest.

The raw endpoint (GET /) stays untouched so existing read-state +
delete code paths keep working. The grouped endpoint reads more rows
(limit * 2, capped) because N raw notifications may collapse to a
single digest, then trims after grouping.

post.description: Store FCM token for push notifications.

get.description: Get participation scores for all students in a course.

schema.title: Response List Quizzes Api Quizzes  Get

get.description: Get questions for a quiz. Lecturers see correct answers, students don't.

post.description: Student submits quiz answers. Auto-graded for mcq/true_false, manual for short_answer.

get.description: Get the current student's attempt for a quiz.
Lecturer: get all attempts for a quiz.
Get quiz results with correct answers (only if showResults is enabled and student has attempted).
Get grade weight settings for a course.

post.description: Set grade weight settings for a course.

get.description: Student: get your unified gradebook across all courses or for a specific course.

schema.title: Response Get My Gradebook Api Gradebook My Get

get.description: Lecturer: get gradebook for all students in a course.
Lecturer: get detailed report for a specific student in a course.
Lecturer: export course gradebook as CSV.
Get all conversations for the current user.

post.description: Get or create a DM conversation with another user.

get.description: Get messages in a conversation.

post.description: Send a message in a conversation.

patch.description: Edit a private message. Only the sender can edit.

delete.description:
Soft-delete a private message. Only the sender can delete.

We mark deleted=True and clear the text on read (in _msg_out) instead of
removing the doc, so both participants see a 'Message deleted' placeholder
in chronological position rather than the message vanishing silently.

get.description: Search users to start a conversation with. Use role=student to list all students.

List assignments in a course that have peer review enabled, with counts.

Returned fields per assignment: id, title, description, deadline,
submission_count (total submissions), my_reviewed_count (submissions the
current user has already reviewed).

Get submissions available for peer review (excluding own).

Only returns results if the assignment has peer review enabled.

post.description: Submit a peer review for a submission.

get.description: Get all peer reviews for a specific submission.
Get reviews the current user has written.
Get completion progress for all enrolled courses.

schema.title: Response Get Course Progress Api Progress Courses Get

get.description: Get all calendar events: assignment deadlines, quiz deadlines, and reminders.

schema.title: Response Get Calendar Events Api Progress Calendar Get

get.description: Get all attendance sessions for a course.

post.description: Create a new attendance session.
Student checks in via QR token.

get.description: Get a single attendance session with all records and student info.

delete.description: Delete an attendance session and its records.

post.description: Regenerate the QR token for an attendance session (lecturer only).

get.description: Get attendance summary for the current student across all courses.
Get the rubric for an assignment.

post.description: Create or replace a rubric for an assignment.
Grade a submission using rubric criterion scores.

get.description: Get all certificates earned by the current user.

schema.title: Response Get My Certificates Api Certificates My Get

get.description: Get all certificates issued for a course (lecturer view).

schema.title: Response Get Course Certificates Api Certificates Course  Cid  Get

post.description: Claim a certificate for a completed course.

get.description: Verify a certificate by its number (public endpoint).
List all groups in a course.

schema.title: Response List Groups Api Courses  Cid  Groups  Get

post.description: Create a new group in a course.
Add students to a group.

delete.description: Remove a student from a group.

post.description: Automatically create groups and randomly distribute students.

get.description: List all group tasks in a course (both roles).

post.description: Create a new group task inside a course.

get.description: Fetch a single group task with all its groups + members.

delete.description: Delete a task and all its groups.

post.description: Create a group inside a group task.

Add students to a group. Each student can be in at most one group per task —
existing memberships within this task are automatically cleared before adding.

Randomly distribute enrolled students into N groups under this task.
Replaces any existing groups within this task (other tasks are untouched).

get.description: List all discussion topics for a course, pinned first, then by last activity.

schema.title: Response List Topics Api Courses  Course Id  Topics  Get

post.description: Create a new discussion topic. Any user can create topics.

patch.description: Update a topic. Only the author or a lecturer can update.

delete.description: Delete a topic and all its posts. Only author or lecturer.

patch.description: Lecturer: toggle pin on a topic.

get.description: Get all posts within a discussion topic.

post.description: Post a message in a discussion topic.

delete.description: Delete a post. Only the author or a lecturer.

get.description: Lecturer: get completion tracking for all students in a course.
Lecturer: get aggregated completion summary for a course.

schema.title: Response List Followers Api Social Followers  User Id  Get
Response List Following Api Social Following  User Id  Get

get.description:
Public maps posted by users the viewer follows, newest first.

Phase 2: simple read-time aggregation. We fetch the viewer's followed-user
ids, batch them into Firestore `in` chunks of 30, fetch each chunk's
public maps sorted by publishedAt desc, merge and sort in Python, trim to
`limit`. Fine while students follow << 30 people; if it gets hot later
we'll migrate to per-user feed subcollections.

schema.title: Response Get Feed Api Social Feed Get

get.description:
Global public maps ordered by likeCount desc, optionally windowed to
the last N days. Used by the Explore → Trending tab.

schema.title: Response Get Trending Api Social Explore Trending Get

get.description:
Students I don't follow yet, ranked by followerCount. A lightweight
v1 — later phases can factor in shared classes, similar interests, etc.

schema.title: Response Get Suggested Users Api Social Explore Suggested Get

get.description:
Student search for the Explore page's Find Classmates field. Case-
insensitive prefix match on email + substring match on displayName.

schema.title: Response Search Users Api Social Users Search Get

post.description:
Add a like. Idempotent — a repeat call returns already_liked without
double-counting. Fires a map_like notification to the owner the first
time, respecting their notificationPrefs.

get.description:
Newest-first comment list for a map. Viewer must be able to read the
map (public/unlisted, owner, collaborator, or elevated role).

schema.title: Response List Comments Api Social Maps  Map Id  Comments Get

post.description: Post a comment on a map. 500-char cap server-side.

delete.description:
Delete a comment. Author can delete their own; map owner can delete any
comment on their map.

post.description:
RAG+GAG (Graph): Build a similarity network across all submissions for an assignment.

Uses multi-agent fan-out: assignment validation runs in parallel with the
expensive similarity graph build — if the assignment doesn't exist, we
detect it immediately without waiting for the graph.
Grade all submissions for an assignment in parallel using multi-agent fan-out.
Return a learning style assessment quiz for the student.
Generate a study material directly from an uploaded PDF — no course/module required.
RAG-powered: generate study materials by topic using multi-source retrieval.
Save a quiz attempt score for a generated study material.

get.description: List all quiz attempts for a specific generated study material.

post.description: Upload a PDF timetable, extract schedule + recommend study times.

get.description: List all saved timetables for the current user.

post.description: Save a parsed timetable with a semester label.
Scrape and preview what modules/items would be created.
Scrape, organise, and create modules/items in the course.
Import pre-edited modules (from the preview step) into a course.

Scrape and organise content from a Google Sites URL (no course_id required).
Used during class creation to preview before creating the course.

get.description: Return available image style presets.
Return how many images the user has generated today and the effective daily limit.

post.description:
Generate an image from a text prompt.

Enforces:
- 2 generations per user per day (UTC).
- Prompt-level deduplication: identical (prompt, style) within 7 days re-uses
  the previously generated image without consuming quota or API credits.

get.description: Return the current user's generated image history (most recent 20).

delete.description: Delete a generated image from the user's history.

post.description: Analyze the current mind map and return suggestions, rating, and recommendations.
Recommend child nodes using RAG + knowledge graph context.
RAG+GAG (Graph): Suggest new nodes using course materials and knowledge graph.
Chat with Smart Buddy about mind map creation. Includes per-user memory.

get.description: Get the user's mindmap buddy memory (chat history + preferences).

delete.description: Clear the user's mindmap buddy memory.

patch.description: Update the user's mindmap buddy preferences.

post.description: Manually trigger re-indexing for a course's content into the vector store.

get.description: Get indexing statistics for a course.

post.description: Scrape a Google Site and return a preview of what would be imported.
SSE streaming version of preview — sends real-time progress events.
Scrape, analyze with AI, and import into MySmartStudy.

Import using previously analyzed data (from the preview step).

If split_by_groups is true and groups exist, creates one course per group
with only that group's items (plus shared/ungrouped items).

Accept feedback on an import to improve future extractions.
The learning system uses this to adjust patterns.

get.description: Get the course knowledge base for viewing/searching.

post.description: Add a new course code + title to the knowledge base.

get.description: Look up a course code in the knowledge base.

post.description: Upload a syllabus file (.xlsx/.xls/.pdf) and extract metadata + weekly topics.
Stream AI enrichment progress per-week via SSE.

get.description: List all CLP drafts for the current lecturer.
Retrieve a saved draft by session ID.

put.description: Update a draft with user edits.

post.description: Generate Excel files for selected weeks.

get.description:
Authenticated read of the AI gate so frontends can hide AI buttons.

Returns the same view of aiConfig/global that the backend will enforce on
the next Gemini call.
Public endpoint to get visible homepage content.
Public endpoint returning real platform stats (counts only, no PII).

PublicProfileOut.title: PublicProfileOut
PublicProfileOut.description:
Lean view of another user for profile + list displays. Mirrors UserOut
but drops admin-ish fields (email, class_name, etc.) and includes a
viewer-relative `is_followed_by_me` flag.

RubricGradeCreate.title: RubricGradeCreate
RubricGradeCreate.description: Grade a submission using a rubric — scores per criterion.
